productDisplayName: New Hide Men Stripes Blue Belts
description: This military green canvas belt from Newhide has a worn metal buckle and a nubuck end. The simple design of this belt lends a military-inspired style to any casual outfit. Length: 38" Made of canvas for easy maintenance Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
